author: Roman Mondello
name: SmearGate + BigramHash + Int6 + SWA + U-Net Skips + Sliding Window
blurb: 11 layers with per-row int6 quantization (MLP+attention) + zstd-22 compression, 3x MLP expansion (hidden=1536, relu^2 activation). SmearGate blends adjacent token embeddings. BigramHash embedding (2048 buckets, dim=128). U-Net skip connections between encoder/decoder halves. Orthogonal init with muP output scaling. Muon optimizer (WD=0.04, momentum warmup 0.92->0.99). SWA every 200 steps over last ~1300 steps (7 snapshots). Trained at seq_len=1024 with batch=524288. Sliding window eval at stride=64. Includes TTT LoRA eval (1.1535 BPB).
note: Single seed. Additional seeds available on request.
